title: cardanthera difformis
intro: Cardanthera difformis, also known as Indian valerian or spurge valerian, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Cardanthera difformis include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its ability to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
